comment: Don't know if it's just me, other people, a glitch, or probably a license kind of thing, but whenever I click on the sound to see other videos that used it, some of them would say "Sound Not Working." But if I search the sound physically instead of clicking on it from a video, the page pops up perfectly fine and I can listen from there. Some work, and some don't. Can you please fix this? Great app btw, too bad it's getting deleted eventually...
